title: DERIVE-TESTS output — build dependency DAG (nodes + acyclicity meta)

components_ref.description: Path to components.json whose edges this DAG encodes

lock_verified.description: True if lock present and names frozen artifact

edge_semantics.description: Human-readable explanation of edge direction semantics

nodes.description: One node per component in components.json; topologically ordered

depends_on.description: C* ids this node depends on (to of every edge whose from == this node); empty = leaf

build_waves.description: Nodes grouped by build wave; wave = 1 + max(wave of depends_on); ascending C* within wave

components.description: C* ids in this wave, ascending

rationale.description: One-line explanation of why nodes land in this wave

build_order.description: Waves concatenated, ascending C* within wave — valid topological order

acyclic.description: True if graph has no cycles

cycles.description: Dependency cycles found; each {nodes:[C*], route}; empty on clean run

coverage.description: Counts verifying all nodes placed in build_order

nodes.description: Total node count; equals components.json component count

edges.description: Total edge count; equals components.json edge count

all_nodes_ordered.description: False if cycle left a node unplaceable

dag_counts.description: Counts derived by walking actual lists

edges.description: Total edge count across all depends_on
